purpose: Manual source audit for 2026-06-19 Royal Ascot. Lists the public/licensed tipster targets an operator may MANUALLY review. It is a SOURCE audit only — not a list of current selections.
disclaimer: Source-audit rows are never model-active. Nothing here is a 2026-06-19 race selection. A source becomes usable only after a human manually opens a public, non-paywalled, non-login page, confirms a real runner-level opinion, captures a short attributable excerpt, and approves it. No scraping, no paywall bypass, no fabrication.
rules: Do NOT scrape websites or fetch logged-in/paywalled/restricted pages.
Do NOT copy full articles — short attributable excerpts only.
Do NOT fabricate tips or let GenAI guess a tipster's opinion.
Do NOT import anything model-active from these source-audit rows alone.
Research documents (strict_verification PDF, Research Brief.docx) are a registry/quality/weighting/correlation basis ONLY — never current selections.
Default every manually captured row to review_status=pending and model_active_eligible=false until explicitly approved.

sources.why: The Profit Rocket, UNDERDOG Racing Tips, and ACTIVE Betting Hub are ONE duplicated PR family — they must not count as three independent votes.
sources.notes: Correlation group PR_family. Cap to a single representative (The Profit Rocket) at ingestion; never three votes. Paid/login style — manual only.
